title: Update animated counters: Happy Families to 20,000+ and Products to 5,000+

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, update the animated counter row values: change '5000+ Happy Customers' (or 'Happy Families') to '20,000+ Happy Families', and change '500+ Products' to '5,000+ Products'. Ensure the counter labels and animated number targets reflect these new values throughout the component.

quotes: Change the happy families to 20 thousands plus and products to 5000

acceptanceCriteria: The hero counter row displays '20,000+ Happy Families' (not '5,000+' or '1,000+').
The hero counter row displays '5,000+ Products' (not '500+').
All other counter values (e.g., '50+ Years') remain unchanged.
Animated counting behavior still works correctly for the updated target numbers.

constraints: Do not alter any other counter labels or values beyond what is specified.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
nonGoals: Changing the backend schema or any backend logic.
Updating Footer social proof text or other section statistics not in the hero counter row.
Any visual theme or layout changes.
